headline: Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT) Partners with Broadcom on Advanced Chip Packaging Technologies for AI Systems
summary: Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the most buzzing AI semiconductor stocks to buy in 2026. On May 20, Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) announced it is teaming up with Broadcom to enhance the development of advanced chip packaging technologies for AI systems. Broadcom is to join the Applied Materials EPIC platform. headline: Why KLA Corporation (KLAC) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) jumped 6.6% in the afternoon session after Micron's blowout day signaled that AI-driven chip demand is structurally undersupplied which is bullish news for the equipment makers and foundries that build the capacity.

headline: Micron Crosses the Trillion-Dollar Line as Chips Dominate Another Session
summary: A single analyst report was all it took. On Tuesday, UBS put a $1,625 price target on Micron Technology - nearly double its opening price - and the market ran with it.

headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Is Up 11.8% After Raising Q3 Outlook And Expanding AI Packaging Alliance
summary: In May 2026, Applied Materials, Inc. reported second‑quarter 2026 sales of US$7.91 billion and net income of US$2.81 billion, raised guidance for third‑quarter 2026 revenue to about US$8.95 billion plus or minus US$500 million, and continued share repurchases under its existing buyback program. Applied Materials also expanded its EPIC equipment and process innovation platform, bringing in partners such as Broadcom and SCREEN Semiconductor Solutions to co‑develop advanced chip packaging and...
